title: Calcearia acuta
intro: Calceolaria acuta, also known as the slender slipper flower, is a flowering plant species in the Calceolaria genus native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The health benefits of Calceolaria acuta include its potential use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and xanthones, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Calceolaria acuta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness the plant's potential health benefits.
